title: The Mahatma Gandhi Antarrashtriya Hindi Vishwavidyalaya Act, 1996
full_text: The Mahatma Gandhi Antarrashtriya Hindi Vishwavidyalaya Act, 1996 महात्‍मा गांधी अन्‍तरराष्‍ट्रीय हिन्‍दी विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1996 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199703 Act Number: 03 Enactment Date: 1997-01-08 Act Year: 1997 Short Title: The Mahatma Gandhi Antarrashtriya Hindi Vishwavidyalaya Act, 1996 Hindi Title: महात्‍मा गांधी अन्‍तरराष्‍ट्रीय हिन्‍दी विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1996 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a teaching University for the promotion and development of Hindi language and literature, through teaching and research, with a view to enabling Hindi to achieve greater functional efficiency and recognition as a major international language and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 29-12-1997 Notification: 29th December, 1997, vide notification No. S.O. 912(E), dated 29th November, 1997, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Mahatma Gandhi Antarrashtriya Hindi Vishwavidyalaya Act, 1996 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of the University. Section 4. Objects of the University. Section 5. Powers of the University. Section 6. Jurisdiction. Power to remove difficulties. Section 43. Transitional provisions. Section 44. Statutes, Ordinances and Regulations to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament.
